basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026: Bharathiar University has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics with first class or equivalent grade
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Physics with first class or equivalent grade. Experience: Satisfactory annual performance review.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month for NET/GATE qualified candidates, Rs. 31,000 + HRA per month for non-NET/GATE candidates
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month for NET/GATE qualified candidates (As per DST-ANRF Norms) Rs. 31,000 + HRA per month for non-NET/GATE candidates (As per DST-ANRF Norms)

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed of the date and mode of interview by e-mail. The selected candidates will be encouraged to apply for Ph.D programme in the Department of Physics

Coimbatore subject to fulfilling the University's admission eligibility criteria. The decision of the selection committee will be final and binding. No correspondence regarding the selection process will be entertained.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Bharathiar University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. in Physics with first class or equivalent grade. Experience: Satisfactory annual performance review.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month for NET/GATE qualified candidates (As per DST-ANRF Norms) Rs. 31,000 + HRA per month for non-NET/GATE candidates (As per DST-ANRF Norms)

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed of the date and mode of interview by e-mail. The selected candidates will be encouraged to apply for Ph.D programme in the Department of Physics, Bharathiar University, Coimbatore subject to fulfilling the University's admission eligibility criteria. The decision of the selection committee will be final and binding. No correspondence regarding the selection process will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at Bharathiar University is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Physics with a first-class or equivalent grade to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For NET/GATE qualified candidates, the salary is Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month. For non-NET/GATE candidates, it is Rs. 31,000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their bio-data and relevant documents via email to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the type of job being offered?
faq.answer: The job is project-based, specifically under the DST-ANRF Research Project.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Bharathiar University located?
faq.answer: Bharathiar University is located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641046.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.
